title: senecio mitophyllus
intro: Senecio mitophyllus, also known as the 'Kaffir Boekenhout', is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The leaves of Senecio mitophyllus have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the leaves are prepared as a tea or infused in oil to create a herbal preparation for medicinal use.
